articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Commercial Arm Unveils Plan To Launch Fiat-Backed Stablecoin Pegged to US Dollar
articles.description: The commercial branch of the Cardano (ADA) blockchain is revealing plans to launch a new fiat-backed crypto asset pegged to the US Dollar. articles.title: Top Crypto Trader Warns Polygon, Binance Coin and One Ethereum Rival Risk Crashing if Bitcoin Dumps
articles.description: A widely followed crypto analyst is warning that a Bitcoin (BTC) dump would likely cause the price crash of Polygon (MATIC), Binance Coin (BNB) and Cosmos (ATOM).
